.gitignore.general_idea: Add Maven wrapper properties to gitignore to prevent tracking generated build configuration.
Add Maven help documentation to gitignore to exclude generated docs from version control.

back-end/pom.xml.general_idea: Add PostgreSQL driver dependency for database connectivity.
Add H2 in-memory database dependency for development/testing.
Add Spring Security starter for authentication and authorization.
Add JWT API dependency for token handling.
Add JWT implementation dependency for token handling.
Add JWT Jackson dependency for JSON serialization in JWT.
Add SpringDoc OpenAPI starter for API documentation.
Add Hibernate Envers for entity auditing.
Add Spring Data Envers for integration with Hibernate Envers.
Add OpenPDF library for PDF generation.
Add Spring Security Test dependency for testing security configurations.
Update Lombok version to 1.18.30 in dependencies and annotation processor paths.
Remove explicit spring-boot-maven-plugin configuration for Lombok exclusion.

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Enable Spring Data Envers auditing by adding repository configuration annotations to the main application class.
Adds Swagger/OpenAPI annotations for documentation and security requirements.
Restricts Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS) to specific allowed origins instead of allowing all.
Adds Spring Security authorization annotation to restrict deletion to ADMIN role.
Adds new endpoint to retrieve general audit history with pagination.
Adds new endpoint to retrieve audit history for a specific patrimony.
Adds new endpoint to generate a PDF report of the current inventory.
Adds new endpoint to generate a PDF report of the movement history.
Expands imports to include new dependencies for pagination, security, and Swagger.
Rename the 'numeroEtiqueta' field to 'etiqueta' to align with updated naming conventions.
Add 'setor' field to the PatrimonioRecordDto record.
Add 'status' field to the PatrimonioRecordDto record.
Add 'valor' field of type BigDecimal to the PatrimonioRecordDto record.
Add import for java.math.BigDecimal to support the new valor field.
Replace wildcard import with explicit imports for Jakarta Persistence annotations.
Remove dependency on Spring HATEOAS RepresentationModel base class.
Add dependency on Hibernate Envers for auditing support.
Add import for Serializable interface to support serialization.
Add import for BigDecimal to support decimal value fields.
Add Audited annotation to enable Hibernate Envers auditing for the entity.
Change class inheritance from RepresentationModel to implementing Serializable.
Fix serialVersionUID constant naming and add @Serial annotation for Java 14+ compliance.
Rename field numeroEtiqueta to etiqueta and remove inline comment.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.before:
@Column(nullable = false, unique = true) // 'unique' impede dois aparelhos com a mesma etiqueta
private String numeroEtiqueta;
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.after:
@Column(nullable = false, unique = true)
private String etiqueta;

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Add new field setor to the model.
Add new field status with default value 'ativo' to the model.
Add new field valor of type BigDecimal to the model.
Add RevisionRepository interface to enable JPA auditing and versioning support for the entity.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.before: public interface PatrimonioRepository extends JpaRepository<PatrimonioModel, UUID> {
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.after: public interface PatrimonioRepository extends JpaRepository<PatrimonioModel, UUID>, RevisionRepository<PatrimonioModel, UUID, Integer> {

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Replace simple list-based search methods with a single paginated JPQL query supporting dynamic filtering.
Remove unused imports for List and Optional as the return types were replaced by Page.
Add necessary Spring Data imports for pagination, querying, and parameters.
Implement PDF export for current asset inventory using iText.
Implement PDF export for asset audit history using iText.
Implement audit history retrieval for a specific asset using Hibernate Envers.
Implement general audit history retrieval with filtering and pagination using Hibernate Envers.
Refactor update method to use Optional mapping and remove HATEOAS link injection.
Refactor delete method to return boolean and remove HATEOAS link injection.
Replace individual search methods with a single filtered paginated list method.
Remove unused HATEOAS controller import.
Remove unused PathVariable import.

back-end/src/main/resources/application..general_idea: Removed hardcoded database connection details (URL, username, password) to rely on environment variables or external configuration.
Removed JPA Hibernate DDL auto-update setting, likely to be managed via Flyway/Liquibase or environment-specific profiles.
Added configuration to disable OpenEntityManagerInViewProxy for better performance and transaction management.
Added Hibernate Envers configuration to store data at deletion time for auditing purposes.
Set Jackson timezone to America/Sao_Paulo for consistent date/time serialization.
Enabled DEBUG logging for Spring Security to aid in debugging authentication/authorization issues.
Configured server port to use environment variable PORT with fallback to 8080, supporting containerized deployments.
Configured SpringDoc to resolve HATEOAS links in API documentation.
Set custom path for SpringDoc API documentation endpoint.
Set custom path for Swagger UI interface.

back-end/src/main/resources/static/scrip.general_idea: Rename the JavaScript property 'numeroEtiqueta' to 'etiqueta' to align with backend model changes.

front-end/index.html.general_idea: Update the favicon link to point to a custom hospital icon instead of the default Vite logo.
Change the page title from the generic Vite template title to the specific application name.
